steps.title: Find the disparity
steps.content: The passage says Brâncuși heavily influenced minimalist and abstract art, but his exacting standards meant he produced relatively few pieces. The blank must capture the contrast between major influence and limited output.

steps.title: Match the contrast
steps.content:
• Choice A: Invents a contrast between Brâncuși's themes and later artists' themes.
  • Choice B: Captures the disparity between his importance and his total output.
  • Choice C: Does not create a real contrast; Bird in Space is an example of his abstract simplicity.
  • Choice D: Claims diversity of sculptures, but the passage says he returned to a few themes.
The answer is B.
